name: local
description:
Building responsive web applications using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and refining my logic in JavaScript.
Open-source projects, especially those focused on Frontend UI/UX or Web Portfolios.
Advanced Backend architecture and learning how to deploy scalable apps on AWS/Vercel.
HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and how to stay motivated while debugging!
believe that "Google-fu" (the art of searching on Google) is a developer's most important skill, and I can survive on coffee and code for hours.
